interactions.summary: The host closes the episode by inviting Jiang back when his book comes out, encouraging listeners to support Predictive History while the channel remains up, and signing off.

speaker_notes.note: Closing host monologue only; no Jiang semantic claims in the focus ref.

claims.claim: The host frames Jiang's next expected public artifact as a book and tells listeners to support Predictive History while the channel remains available.
claims.temporal_scope: Host closeout as of the 2026-03-18 interview.

chronology_notes.note: The host's closing reinforces that, at publication time, Jiang's book is expected in the future and the channel is potentially temporary.
